title: What happens when ChatGPT becomes the front door to crypto
summary: ChatGPT could become crypto’s new onboarding gateway, making Bitcoin and wallets easier to use while creating new trust risks.

title: Ledn adds Tether Gold as loan collateral, expanding Bitcoin-backed lending model
summary: Ledn’s addition of Tether Gold lending comes as tokenized commodities expand, with the sector accounting for nearly 17% of the $43 billion RWA market.

title: Second Iran-Bound Corn Ship Crossed Hormuz Before Peace Deal
summary: A second ship laden with corn bound for Iran transited the Strait of Hormuz just hours before the US-Iran interim deal to end the war and reopen the waterway was announced.

title: Stranded Oil Is Streaming Out of Hormuz as Deal Takes Effect
summary: A growing stream of stranded oil is making its way out of the Strait of Hormuz and Kuwait said it will start ramping up production, as the US-Iran interim peace deal sparks a flurry of activity that is already pushing Middle East flows toward pre-war levels.

title: CME Group to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval in Clash Over Dodd-Frank Classification
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CME Group to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval in Clash Over Dodd-Frank Classification
CME Group plans to sue the CFTC over its approval of bitcoin perpetual futures, arguing the contracts are swaps — not futures — under Dodd-Frank.

title: Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged but signaled potential rate hikes under new Chair Kevin Warsh as inflation concerns persist, sending Bitcoin and stocks lower.

title: Morning Minute: Crypto Sinks After Hawkish FOMC
summary: Bitcoin slid to $64k as rate hike odds soared after Kevin Warsh's first FOMC presser. But was it Warsh or Saylor truly driving the selloff?

title: Ireland Tightens Crypto Safeguards in New Financial Crime Action Plan
summary: A new National Risk Assessment names crypto-asset misuse among Ireland's top threats, as a 30-point plan tightens checks on crypto funds.

title: Federal Reserve rolls out proposing rulemaking requiring stablecoin issuers to maintain customer identification program
summary: The Fed rolled out a rule requiring stablecoin issuers to have a program in place to identify customers to combat illicit finance.

title: Kraken integrates Solana DEX trading into core app, with support for additional networks planned
summary: Kraken launches onchain DEX trading to give customers access to thousands of tokens across the Solana ecosystem.

title: Hegseth unveils six-month review of US military presence in Europe
summary: Defence secretary announced decision as he scolded Nato allies for failing to support Washington in Iran war

title: US and Iran sign deal as Trump vows to release frozen funds and ease sanctions
summary: President says Iranians will receive incentives when they ‘behave’ and acknowledges Tehran will keep ballistic missiles
